privileged_info_summary: Verified that Splunk is configured with credentials admin / SplunkAdmin1! via install_splunk.sh. The log data is real-world data downloaded from SecRepo, Loghub (Zenodo), and Splunk Tutorial. The task requires creating event types 'ssh_failed_login' (with tags 'authentication', 'failure') and 'apache_critical_error' (with tags 'error', 'critical'), and a saved search 'Unified_SOC_Alerts', which directly match the task description and are explicitly checked in verifier.py.
